title: The Exit
content: As you head for the door, Thorne speaks one last time, his voice dropping an octave. 'I know where you work, Detective. I know you like your scotch neat and your office cold. It's a charmingly archaic life you lead.'||'Be careful. London is a dangerous place for those who walk alone. I'd hate to see such a dedicated professional become just another statistic in the city's files.'
